# FitOn Workouts & Fitness Plans · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 24, 2026 - Mar 24, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Anetzzz_, Mar 24, 2026, 3/5: "So I’ve been using this for a couple years. Helps me just move in the morning. I only connect w two of the trainers. All was fine until about five or six months ago. Suddenly after every workout it is mandatory to rate that workout you just did. Even if you’ve done it dozens and dozens of times. It was never mandatory before but now you have to exit the app to get to anything else. Irritating. Yes, I’ve written the devs, had to send screenshots so they would believe me. But it’s broken. On two different devices and versions of iOS. So yeah- it’s frustrating they can’t figure that out. Otherwise the app helps me keep moving in the mornings."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 5, 2026 - May 31, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _abjuly_, May 31, 2026, 4/5: "There is such a wonderful variety of classes on here. I mostly do stretching and yoga and am always discovering new classes and trainers, so I don’t think I will ever run out of options! I also really like the monthly step competitions as they motivate me to get in some extra walks. However, sometimes the app loses the connection to Apple Health and the steps do not transfer over to FitOn. The support team has usually acknowledged the problem, and usually it is fixed within 24 hours, but still this is not great. While even the paid version of the app is inexpensive, I still think it should work properly."
            2. _Trustworthy$&”;_, May 5, 2026, 4/5: "I joined using Apple Pay. Only after I paid the subscription fee was I informed it auto renews. I did not approve this. I tried to contact the company. There is only a lame AI bot that informs you you can only cancel the paid subscription (no refund) to remove auto renew"
